relationships.context: Gmail API is used to scan emails
Email scanning leads to basic data enrichment
Basic enrichment contributes to creating an enriched profile
Web search is used to enrich profiles
LinkedIn is used to gather information for enriched profiles
Deep research is part of the enrichment process
V reviews and approves the enriched profile
Enriched profiles contribute to forming stakeholder profiles
Stakeholder profiles are related to the planned Howie integration
